identity.name: The Field Commander
identity.description: A dark-mode-first baseball scorekeeping interface designed for night games and rapid decision-making. It combines the utility of a military dashboard with the aesthetics of a modern sports broadcast.

layout_strategy.spacing: generous (p-4 to p-8 for containers, gap-4 for grids)
layout_strategy.container_style: rounded-xl border border-slate-800 bg-slate-900/60 backdrop-blur-md shadow-2xl

sections.header: col-span-12 h-20 flex items-center justify-between px-6 border-b border-slate-800/60
sections.main_area: col-span-12 lg:col-span-12 grid grid-cols-12 gap-6 p-4
sections.field_view: col-span-12 lg:col-span-6 aspect-square relative bg-gradient-to-br from-slate-900 to-slate-950 rounded-2xl border border-slate-800 overflow-hidden
sections.log_panel: col-span-12 lg:col-span-3 h-[600px] overflow-hidden flex flex-col
sections.controls_deck: col-span-12 grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-8 gap-3 p-4 bg-slate-900/80 border-t border-slate-800 sticky bottom-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl

Scoreboard.description: Displays Home/Away scores, Inning, and B-S-O count. Uses Barlow Condensed for large numbers.

FieldVisualization.description: SVG representation of baseball diamond. Dynamic player markers. 'Avanza' badges for base runners.

PlayerCard.description: Compact card for Batter/Pitcher stats. Uses glassmorphism.

ActionGrid.description: The command center. Grid of colored buttons for scoring.

PlayLog.description: Scrollable list of recent plays with timestamp and outcome codes.

TeamManager.description: Modal/Drawer for managing lineups and rosters.

instructions_to_main_agent: Follow the 'Field Commander' dark mode aesthetic strictly. No white backgrounds.
Use 'Barlow Condensed' for all headings and score numbers to give it that sports broadcast feel.
Implement the 'FieldVisualization' using SVG for crisp rendering on all devices. Do not use a static image.
The 'Control Deck' must be sticky at the bottom for mobile accessibility.
Use the provided color tokens for specific actions (Red=Out, Green=Ball, Blue=Hit) to match the user's mental model.
Ensure the 'Undo' button is prominent and easily accessible.
Use 'sonner' for toast notifications when actions are recorded.
Data-testids are mandatory for all interactive elements (e.g., 'action-btn-strike', 'field-base-1').
Do NOT ask the user for clarification. Use your best judgment based on these guidelines.
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
